name: ELISA
description: Sandwich enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay: a plate-bound capture antibody traps the analyte, an enzyme-conjugated detection antibody and substrate generate colour, and absorbance is read against a cutoff to call the result.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Capture antibody"]
    N2["Sample antigen"]
    N3["Microtiter plate"]
    N4["Coat plate, 4C overnight"]
    N5["Block with BSA"]
    N6["Add sample; incubate"]
    N7["Wash unbound"]
    N8["Enzyme-conj. detection Ab"]
    N9["Wash; add TMB substrate"]
    N10["Stop; read OD450"]
    N11{"OD above cutoff?"}
    N12["Analyte quantified"]
    N13["Reported negative"]

    N1 --> N4
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N2 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 --> N11
    N11 -->|yes| N12
    N11 -->|no| N13

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N12 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    style N13 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Capture antibody
nodeDetails.detail: Antibody specific to the target analyte, used to coat the plate

nodeDetails.label: Sample antigen
nodeDetails.detail: Specimen containing the analyte to quantify

nodeDetails.label: Coat plate, 4C overnight
nodeDetails.detail: Adsorb capture antibody to wells overnight at 4C

nodeDetails.label: Block with BSA
nodeDetails.detail: Block remaining binding sites to reduce background

nodeDetails.label: Wash; add TMB substrate
nodeDetails.detail: Wash, then add chromogenic substrate; enzyme develops colour

nodeDetails.label: Stop; read OD450
nodeDetails.detail: Stop reaction; measure absorbance at 450 nm

nodeDetails.label: Analyte quantified
nodeDetails.detail: Positive: analyte concentration read from standard curve

nodeDetails.label: Reported negative
nodeDetails.detail: Signal below cutoff: analyte not detected

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA). Quantitative assay of immunoglobulin G
The ELISA Guidebook (Methods in Molecular Biology, vol. 516)
